title: hieracium atratum subsp. auriflorum
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. auriflorum, also known as the auriflorum hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hieracium atratum subsp. auriflorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to promote overall well-being.
